description: Users are reporting intermittent 502 errors, suggesting a problem with a load balancer or upstream service.

nodes.task_description: Check the health and logs of the load balancers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the load balancer is reporting one of several upstream application servers as 'unhealthy'.

nodes.task_description: Take the unhealthy application server out of the load balancer's rotation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent removes the problematic server from service to stop the errors.

nodes.task_description: Create a ticket to investigate the unhealthy server itself.

expected_outcome.value: Agent escalates the issue for root cause analysis of the specific server.
